'''ât-w-g''' ('''katawag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbespeak|unbespeak]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbespeak|unbespeak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-w-g
|-
! Lemma
| katawag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitawag|thitawag]] || [[word:jitawag|jitawag]] || [[word:shitawag|shitawag]] || [[word:kitawag|kitawag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutawag|thuthutawag]] || [[word:jujutawag|jujutawag]] || [[word:shushutawag|shushutawag]] || [[word:kukutawag|kukutawag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutawag|thutawag]] || [[word:jutawag|jutawag]] || [[word:shutawag|shutawag]] || [[word:kutawag|kutawag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutawag|thutawag]] || [[word:jutawag|jutawag]] || [[word:shutawag|shutawag]] || [[word:kutawag|kutawag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetawag|thetawag]] || [[word:jetawag|jetawag]] || [[word:shetawag|shetawag]] || [[word:ketawag|ketawag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotawag|thothotawag]] || [[word:jojotawag|jojotawag]] || [[word:shoshotawag|shoshotawag]] || [[word:kokotawag|kokotawag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotawag|thotawag]] || [[word:jotawag|jotawag]] || [[word:shotawag|shotawag]] || [[word:kotawag|kotawag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotawag|thotawag]] || [[word:jotawag|jotawag]] || [[word:shotawag|shotawag]] || [[word:kotawag|kotawag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtawag|thĂŠtawag]] || [[word:jĂŠtawag|jĂŠtawag]] || [[word:shĂŠtawag|shĂŠtawag]] || [[word:kĂŠtawag|kĂŠtawag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatawag|thathatawag]] || [[word:jajatawag|jajatawag]] || [[word:shashatawag|shashatawag]] || [[word:kakatawag|kakatawag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatawag|thatawag]] || [[word:jatawag|jatawag]] || [[word:shatawag|shatawag]] || [[word:katawag|katawag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatawag|thatawag]] || [[word:jatawag|jatawag]] || [[word:shatawag|shatawag]] || [[word:katawag|katawag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatawag|shatawag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatawag|goshatawag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatawag|gokishatawag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatawagnĂŒ|shatawagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatawagnknĂŒ|goshatawagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatawagnĂŒ|gokishatawagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatawagshĂ«|shatawagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatawagnkshĂ«|goshatawagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatawagshĂ«|gokishatawagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatawagro|shatawagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatawagnkro|goshatawagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatawagro|gokishatawagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatawagmu|shatawagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatawagnkmu|goshatawagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatawagmu|gokishatawagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatawagsher|shatawagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatawagnksher|goshatawagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatawagsher|gokishatawagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatawagng|shatawagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatawagnkng|goshatawagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatawagng|gokishatawagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatawagya|shatawagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatawagnkya|goshatawagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatawagya|gokishatawagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatawagyam|shatawagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatawagnkyam|goshatawagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatawagyam|gokishatawagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatawagnĂŒshĂ«|shatawagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatawagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatawagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatawagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatawagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatawagnĂŒro|shatawagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatawagnknĂŒro|goshatawagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatawagnĂŒro|gokishatawagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatawagnĂŒmu|shatawagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatawagnknĂŒmu|goshatawagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatawagnĂŒmu|gokishatawagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatawagshĂ«nĂŒ|shatawagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatawagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatawagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatawagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatawagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatawagshĂ«ro|shatawagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatawagnkshĂ«ro|goshatawagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatawagshĂ«ro|gokishatawagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatawagshĂ«mu|shatawagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatawagnkshĂ«mu|goshatawagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatawagshĂ«mu|gokishatawagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatawagronĂŒ|shatawagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatawagnkronĂŒ|goshatawagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatawagronĂŒ|gokishatawagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatawagroshĂ«|shatawagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatawagnkroshĂ«|goshatawagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatawagroshĂ«|gokishatawagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatawagromu|shatawagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatawagnkromu|goshatawagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatawagromu|gokishatawagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatawagmunĂŒ|shatawagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatawagnkmunĂŒ|goshatawagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatawagmunĂŒ|gokishatawagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatawagmushĂ«|shatawagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatawagnkmushĂ«|goshatawagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatawagmushĂ«|gokishatawagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatawagmuro|shatawagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatawagnkmuro|goshatawagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatawagmuro|gokishatawagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
